examples: They bought their own dishes and silverware and brought them to America.
Today, most people in Western cultures expect to eat meals with their own set of silverware, their own plates, and their own glasses.
He has his own silverware at home.
"I hope to help Wigan win some silverware before I hang up the boots, " Deacon said.
They even bring silverware to a nearby coffeehouse to avoid using the shop's plastic utensils.
